html:
Exclusive to:

The Stone Egg is an naturally spawning Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found at the BFB's nest and can be grown slowly until hatching into Ro Bin along with the Ro Bin Gizzard Stone. It will take 3 days for the egg to hatch, so long as it stays within the required heat conditions.

The Stone Egg has three states, normal, overheated, and freezing. The Stone Egg grows while it is normal, and slowly shrinks when it is overheated or freezing. During the Night, the Egg will be freezing unless being placed close to a Fire, but during the Day, it will overheat if too close to a Fire. Unlike Hatching Tallbird Egg, it will never freeze or heat to death.

Despite being Eggs, The Stone Egg cannot be used in Crock Pot and has no Egg value.

Bugs

  • Sneezing and dropping the Stone Egg will reset its progress.

Gallery

  • An overheated Stone Egg.
  • A freezing Stone Egg.
  • A Stone Egg found at the BFB's nest.
  • An overheated Stone Egg after it's been placed by a Fire Pit.
  • A freezing Stone Egg.
  • Hatching progress of the Stone Egg.

Exclusive to:
Stone Egg
Does not stack
Perk
Hatches into Ro Bin and the Ro Bin Gizzard Stone.
"roc_robin_egg"
“Stone cold.”
–Wilson
“It needs fire. Like me.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang break it open.”
–Wolfgang
“I doubt it will ever hatch.”
–Wendy
“PROTECTED BY FIREWALL”
–WX-78
“Perhaps I should incubate this.”
–Wickerbottom
“Does a stone egg still hatch?”
–Woodie
“Is it a stone or an egg?”
–Maxwell
“A large bird is incubating inside!”
–Wagstaff
“Unleash thy tiny bird!”
–Wigfrid
“I think there's something in there.”
–Webber
“What's inside?!”
–Walani
“Can I make eggs benedict with this?”
–Warly
“'tis treasure within!”
–Woodlegs
“AS COLD AS ANY STONE”
–Wilba
“Needs warm”
–Wormwood
“Maybe if I help it hatch, it'll fly me away from here.”
–Wheeler

The Stone Egg has three states, normal, overheated, and freezing. The Stone Egg grows while it is normal, and slowly shrinks when it is overheated or freezing. During the Night, the Egg will be freezing unless being placed close to a Fire, but during the Day, it will overheat if too close to a Fire. Unlike Hatching Tallbird Egg, it will never freeze or heat to death.
Despite being Eggs, The Stone Egg cannot be used in Crock Pot and has no Egg value.

The '''Stone Egg''' is an naturally spawning [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found at the [[BFB]]'s nest and can be grown slowly until hatching into [[Ro Bin]] along with the [[Ro Bin Gizzard Stone]]. It will take 3 days for the egg to hatch, so long as it stays within the required heat conditions.

The Stone Egg has three states, normal, overheated, and freezing. The Stone Egg grows while it is normal, and slowly shrinks when it is overheated or freezing. During the [[Night]], the Egg will be freezing unless being placed close to a [[Fire]], but during the [[Day]], it will overheat if too close to a Fire. Unlike [[Hatching Tallbird Egg]], it will never freeze or heat to death.

Despite being [[Eggs]], The Stone Egg cannot be used in [[Crock Pot]] and has no Egg value.

=={{Pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
* [[Hay Fever|Sneezing]] and dropping the Stone Egg will reset its progress.
